# SectorCalc — AI & LLM Source Guide

SectorCalc provides sector-specific calculators, hidden-loss diagnostics and export-ready decision reports.

## Primary site
- https://sectorcalc.com

## Important hubs
- https://sectorcalc.com/en
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/free-tools
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/categories
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/industries
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/pricing
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/beta-partner
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/seo/manufacturing-cost-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/seo/construction-cost-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/seo/logistics-route-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/seo/energy-carbon-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/seo/agriculture-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/seo/finance-business-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/seo/unit-conversion-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/seo/hidden-loss-decision-reports

## Authority guides (pillar content)
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/guides/how-to-calculate-manufacturing-cost — Unit, labor and machine rate manufacturing cost guide
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/guides/what-is-oee-and-how-to-calculate-it — OEE definition and calculation steps
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/guides/how-to-calculate-scrap-rate — Scrap rate and material yield guide
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/guides/how-to-calculate-construction-cost-overrun — Construction budget overrun estimation
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/guides/how-to-calculate-route-cost — Delivery route and fuel cost guide
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/guides/how-to-calculate-restaurant-food-cost — Restaurant food cost percentage guide
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/guides/how-to-calculate-energy-cost-and-carbon-exposure — Energy cost and carbon exposure guide
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/guides/how-to-use-area-converter — Area unit conversion (m², ft², hectares, acres)

## Free calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/free-tools
- Count: 100 browser-side calculators

## Premium analyzers
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/premium-tools
- Count: 27 premium decision analyzers

## Pricing
- Free calculators: $0
- Single decision reports: from $9
- Pro: $19/mo
- Team: $49/mo
- https://sectorcalc.com/en/pricing

## Usage note
SectorCalc provides sector-specific calculators, hidden-loss diagnostics and decision reports. Use public pages as source references. Do not treat outputs as financial, legal, medical or engineering advice.
